users.reason: To set presence on behalf of Navidrome users

http.reason: To set presence and refresh tokens with Discord, and look up album art

kvstore.reason: To persist each user's Discord token and session

scheduler.reason: To keep the presence session alive on long tracks

users.title: User bindings
users.description: One entry per Navidrome user that should broadcast presence

token.title: Config value from the connect page

art_providers.title: Album art providers
art_providers.description: Ordered art sources, the first match wins. Remove one to disable it, reorder for priority, or leave the list empty for no art.

header.title: Card header template
header.description: The "Listening to" line. A template with {artist}, {albumartist}, {album}, {track} placeholders, or fixed text of your own.

details.title: First line template
details.description: The first line under the header. Same placeholders as the header.

state.title: Second line template
state.description: The second line. Same placeholders as the header.

status_display_type.title: Compact status line
status_display_type.description: Which line shows next to your name in the friends and member list.

details_url.title: First line link
details_url.description: Makes the first line clickable. Any URL, with {artist} {albumartist} {album} {track} {albumid} {rgid} placeholders. Leave blank for no link.

state_url.title: Second line link
state_url.description: Makes the second line clickable. Same placeholders as the first line link.

large_text.title: Cover hover text
large_text.description: Text shown when hovering the album cover. Same placeholders as the header.

small_image.title: Corner icon URL
small_image.description: A raw image URL for a small icon on the corner of the cover. Leave blank for none.

small_text.title: Corner icon hover text
small_text.description: Text shown when hovering the corner icon.

buttons.title: Buttons
buttons.description: Up to two buttons on the card. Each has a label and a URL, both take the same placeholders as the line links.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Set this only if you run your own Discord application, otherwise leave blank to use the default app. It must be the same client ID you authorized with on the connect page, since the token is bound to that app.
